subsections.title: Introduction
requirements: Requirements on UE regarding measurement reporting in RRC_CONNECTED state
Requirements split into intra-frequency, inter-frequency, inter-RAT E-UTRAN FDD/TDD, and L1-RSRP measurements
Measurement quantities defined in TS 38.215
Measurement model defined in TS 38.300, TS 37.340
Measurement accuracies specified in clause 10
Control of measurement reporting in TS 38.331
notes: UE shall perform RRM measurements when provided with IDC solution
Exceptions for side conditions apply for CA-capable UE per Annex B

requirements: UE determines measurement gap timing based on gap offset configuration and measurement gap timing advance configuration
During per-UE measurement gaps, UE is not required to conduct reception/transmission from/to serving cells except RRM measurement signals and random access signals
During per-FR measurement gaps, UE is not required to conduct reception/transmission from/to serving cells in the corresponding FR
notes: Measurement gap patterns #24 and #25 can only be used during positioning measurement period
Gap pattern #0 and #1 restrictions apply for GSM/UTRA inter-RAT measurements

subsections.title: EN-DC: Maximum allowed layers for multiple monitoring
requirements: 7 NR SSB inter-frequency carriers configured by PSCell
8 NR inter-frequency carriers including SSB and CSI-RS in total configured by PSCell
7 NR SSB inter-RAT carriers excluding NR serving carrier(s) configured by E-UTRA PCell
6 E-UTRA TDD inter-frequency carriers configured by E-UTRA PCell
6 E-UTRA FDD inter-frequency carriers configured by E-UTRA PCell
3 FDD UTRA carriers
3 TDD UTRA carriers
32 GSM carriers (one GSM layer corresponds to 32 carriers)
Total of at least 13 effective carrier frequency layers

subsections.title: SA: Maximum allowed layers for multiple monitoring
requirements: 7 NR SSB inter-frequency carriers configured by PCell
8 NR inter-frequency carriers including SSB and CSI-RS in total configured by PCell
7 E-UTRA TDD inter-RAT carriers configured by PCell
7 E-UTRA FDD inter-RAT carriers configured by PCell
3 UTRA FDD inter-RAT carriers configured by PCell

subsections.description: CSSFwithin_gap,i derivation for different operation modes

subsections.title: EN-DC: CSSF for SSB, CSI-RS, RSSI measurements within gaps

formulas.description: CSSF within gap for per-FR gap UE

formulas.latex: CSSF_{within\_gap,i} = \max\left\{ \begin{matrix} \lceil R_i \times K_{intra} \times M_{intra,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{inter,i,j} \neq 0 \\ \lceil R_i \times M_{intra,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{inter,i,j} = 0 \end{matrix} \right.

CSSF_{within\_gap,i} = \max\left\{ \begin{matrix} \lceil R_i \times K_{inter} \times M_{inter,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{intra,i,j} \neq 0 \\ \lceil R_i \times M_{inter,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{intra,i,j} = 0 \end{matrix} \right.

variables: Mintra,i,j: Number of intra-frequency measurement objects candidates in gap j
Minter,i,j: Number of inter-frequency/inter-RAT measurement objects candidates in gap j
Mtot,i,j = Mintra,i,j + Minter,i,j: Total number of candidates in gap j
Ri: Maximal ratio of measurement gaps where object i is candidate

subsections.title: SA: CSSF for SSB, CSI-RS, RSSI, L1-RSRP measurements within gaps

formulas.description: CSSF within gap for per-FR gap UE

formulas.latex: CSSF_{within\_gap,i} = \max\left\{ \begin{matrix} \lceil R_i \times K_{intra} \times M_{intra,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{inter,i,j} \neq 0 \\ \lceil R_i \times M_{intra,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{inter,i,j} = 0 \end{matrix} \right.

CSSF_{within\_gap,i} = \max\left\{ \begin{matrix} \lceil R_i \times K_{inter} \times M_{inter,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{intra,i,j} \neq 0 \\ \lceil R_i \times M_{inter,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{intra,i,j} = 0 \end{matrix} \right.

subsections.title: NE-DC: CSSF for SSB, CSI-RS measurements within gaps

formulas.description: CSSF within gap for per-FR gap UE

formulas.latex: CSSF_{within\_gap,i} = \max\left\{ \begin{matrix} \lceil R_i \times K_{intra} \times M_{groupA,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{groupB,i,j} \neq 0 \\ \lceil R_i \times M_{groupA,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{groupB,i,j} = 0 \end{matrix} \right.

CSSF_{within\_gap,i} = \max\left\{ \begin{matrix} \lceil R_i \times K_{inter} \times M_{groupB,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{groupA,i,j} \neq 0 \\ \lceil R_i \times M_{groupB,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{groupA,i,j} = 0 \end{matrix} \right.

variables: MgroupA,i,j: Sum of FR1 and FR2 intra-frequency measurement objects
MgroupB,i,j: Number of inter-frequency, inter-RAT, and positioning frequency layers

subsections.title: NR-DC: CSSF for SSB, CSI-RS, L1-RSRP measurements within gaps

formulas.description: CSSF within gap for per-FR gap UE

formulas.latex: CSSF_{within\_gap,i} = \max\left\{ \begin{matrix} \lceil R_i \times K_{intra} \times M_{groupA,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{groupB,i,j} \neq 0 \\ \lceil R_i \times M_{groupA,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{groupB,i,j} = 0 \end{matrix} \right.

CSSF_{within\_gap,i} = \max\left\{ \begin{matrix} \lceil R_i \times K_{inter} \times M_{groupB,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{groupA,i,j} \neq 0 \\ \lceil R_i \times M_{groupB,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{groupA,i,j} = 0 \end{matrix} \right.

subsections.title: Monitoring of multiple layers within NCSG

formulas.description: CSSF within NCSG for SA mode - equal sharing
CSSF within NCSG - intra-frequency non-equal sharing
formulas.latex: CSSF_{within\_ncsg,i} = \max\left\{ \begin{matrix} \lceil K_{intra} \times M_{intra,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{inter,i,j} \neq 0 \\ M_{intra,i,j} & \text{if } M_{inter,i,j} = 0 \end{matrix} \right.

formulas.description: CSSF within NCSG - inter-frequency non-equal sharing
formulas.latex: CSSF_{within\_ncsg,i} = \max\left\{ \begin{matrix} \lceil K_{inter} \times M_{inter,i,j} \rceil & \text{if } M_{intra,i,j} \neq 0 \\ M_{inter,i,j} & \text{if } M_{intra,i,j} = 0 \end{matrix} \right.

When UE transitions between DRX and non-DRX or DRX cycle changes, requirements with longer delay apply

subsections.title: Collisions between MUSIM gaps and measurement gaps
Introduction
requirements: SSB based intra-frequency measurement when center frequency and SCS of serving and neighbor cell SSBs are the same
UE shall identify new intra-frequency cells and perform SS-RSRP, SS-RSRQ, SS-SINR measurements
UE can perform measurements without gaps if SSB is completely contained in active BWP or UE indicates no-gap

subsections.title: Requirements applicability
requirements: Cell shall be detectable when SS-RSRP, SS-RSRQ, SS-SINR side conditions are met
SSB_RP and SSB Es/Iot according to Annex B.2.2

requirements: 8 identified cells per intra-frequency layer

subsections.title: Requirements for FR2
requirements: 6 identified cells per intra-frequency layer
24 SSBs with different SSB index and/or PCI

formulas.description: PSS/SSS sync time FR1 No DRX

formulas.latex: T_{PSS/SSS\_sync\_intra} = \max(600 \text{ ms}, \lceil M_2 \times 5 \times K_p \rceil \times \max(\text{SMTC period}, \text{DRX cycle})) \times CSSF_{intra}

formulas.description: PSS/SSS sync time FR2 No DRX
formulas.latex: T_{PSS/SSS\_sync\_intra} = \max(600 \text{ ms}, \lceil M_{pss/sss\_sync\_w/o\_gaps} \times K_{FR} \times K_p \times K_{layer1\_measurement} \rceil \times \text{SMTC period}) \times CSSF_{intra}

formulas.description: Kp scaling factor for concurrent GAPs
